\u003ch2\u003eImprovements\u003c/h2\u003e\n    \u003cul\u003e\n      \u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFix Text Encoding/Spacing:\u003c/strong\u003e The resume text contains significant spacing issues ATS systems will fail to parse these as individual words, leading to a failure in keyword indexing. Ensure there are standard spaces between all words.\u003c/li\u003e\n      \u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eQuantify Achievements:\u003c/strong\u003e While you list responsibilities, you lack metrics. Instead of \"Managing project deliverables,\" use \"Delivered 15+ high-priority projects 10% under budget over 2 years.\"\u003c/li\u003e\n      \u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRemove Personal Information:\u003c/strong\u003e Remove \"Date of Birth\" and \"Languages Known\" (unless specifically requested).
